title: SecGate config
description: Configuration for .secgate.config.json — place in the scan target directory.

failOn.description: Severity tiers that cause SecGate to exit 1. Default: ["critical","high"].

scanners.description: Enable or disable individual scanners. Set a key to false to skip that scanner entirely.

severityOverrides.description: Override the severity of findings whose signature matches a rule pattern. Patterns support literal strings and '*' wildcard. First match wins.

rule.description: Glob-style pattern matched against finding.signature. Use '*' as a wildcard.

ignore.description: Signatures to drop entirely. Supports literal strings and '*' wildcard. Ignored findings are excluded from counters and the fail-gate.

baselineFile.description: Path to the baseline JSON file. Relative paths are resolved from the scan target. Default: .secgate-baseline.json.

customSemgrepRules.description: Path to custom Semgrep rules directory or config file. Passed as --config=<path> in addition to --config=auto. Relative paths are resolved from the scan target.
